landing.heroSubtitle: Create elegant and interactive invitations for your wedding, birthday, or any important event. Amaze your guests from the very first second.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Modern solutions that turn digital invitations into a work of art
landing.feat1Desc: Interactive envelope opening animation with a wax seal, conveying the emotions of a real letter.
landing.feat2Desc: Guests confirm their attendance, and you instantly receive a notification on Telegram.
landing.feat3Desc: Pleasant background music and interactive maps to the event locations.
landing.feat4Desc: Show guests the color scheme of the event for beautiful color harmony in photos.
landing.feat5Desc: Share your best photos directly on the invitation page, creating the mood.
landing.feat6Desc: Create, edit invitations and export the complete guest list in Excel (CSV) format.
landing.step1Desc: Choose a unique link for your invitation (e.g., /i/robert-lusine).
landing.step2Desc: Enter dates, locations, select music, and upload photos.
landing.step3Desc: Connect your Telegram chat to receive guest responses instantly.
landing.step4Desc: Share the finished link on social networks and track RSVP statistics.
landing.adminPreviewDesc: With our platform, you are in full control of your event. A simple yet functional admin panel allows you to manage all data from any device.
landing.adminFeature2: Instant upload of files and images
landing.adminFeature3: RSVP response statistics and Excel export

rsvp.confirmTitle: Please confirm your attendance by May 25.
rsvp.attendanceLabel: Will you be able to attend?
rsvp.successMsg: Thank you, your response has been successfully sent.
rsvp.errorMsg: An error occurred. Please try again later.
rsvp.alertName: Please enter at least one name.

contactForm.title: It is with great joy that we want to share with you the most beautiful and memorable moment of our lives.
contactForm.intro: We lovingly invite you to be by our side and celebrate this special day together. Bring love, smiles, and endless positive emotions, as well as comfortable shoes for dancing.
contactForm.thanksTitle: Thank you, your response has been registered.
contactForm.dressCodeHint: Let the bride be the only one in a white dress on that day 🤍
contactForm.rsvpLegend: Will you be able to attend the event?
contactForm.rsvpNo: Unfortunately, I will not be able to
contactForm.invitedByPlaceholder: Name of the person who invited you
contactForm.hint: Enter names of additional guests (if any)
contactForm.alertRsvp: Please select whether you will attend the event.

calendar.title: Our Memorable Day
calendar.intro: We are very happy to share with you the most anticipated and unforgettable moment of our lives. Your presence is invaluable to us.
calendar.invite: We lovingly invite you to be by our side and celebrate this beautiful day together. Let's create unforgettable memories together.
